editorial_summary.main_strength: Instant funding structure with high standard profit split and documented trailing drawdown rules.

programs.program_description: Two-tier Pro Challenge with 10% Tier 1 target, 5% Tier 2 target, 5% daily simulated drawdown and 10% maximum simulated drawdown according to official help center.

plans.drawdown_calculation_notes: Daily simulated drawdown is 5% of the higher of starting day virtual balance or equity and resets daily at 5 PM EST; max drawdown is 10% of initial simulated balance.

plans.news_trading_details: Allowed only with News Trading add-on in funded/pro rules; otherwise red-folder restrictions apply.
plans.weekend_holding_details: Weekend trading/holding is allowed in challenge and funded accounts according to trading policies.
important_notes: The 1 Phase Challenge has different rules: 3% daily loss, 6% trailing max loss, 10% target, and 3 minimum trading days.
